violations.text: Stagnant water observed in food processor. Equipment to be air dried after cleaning and sanitizing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025
Walk-in freezer condensate pipe observed leaking into pan. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
Wall end caps near handsink and grill were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. Junctures where floor and walls meet in the walk-in cooler 2. Wall end caps located by walls near handsink and grill 3. The ceiling near the dishmachine and 3 bay sink (painted ceiling observed chipping) 4. Walk-in freezer gasket The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of the following were observed with an accumulation of food and soil residue: 1. Ice machine (black residue); equipment was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use 2. Slicer 3. Food processor 4. Can opener The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer, food processor, and can opener were cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Per interview of staff, whole shelled raw eggs can be ordered and cooked to preference. Eggs served and cooked to preference that are not fully cooked must be pasteurized whole shelled raw eggs. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Fly insecticide vapor strips were observed throughout the kitchen in various areas stored in close proximity to foods or in food preparation areas. Adequate spacing or partition required. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Cardboard is used to line various shelving in kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Shelving in walk-in cooler 2. Side of flattop grill 3. Bottom shelf of salad prep unit New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. Junctures where floor and walls meet in the walk-in cooler 2. Wall end caps located by walls near handsink and grill 3. The ceiling near the dishmachine and 3 bay sink (painted ceiling observed chipping) 4. Walk-in freezer gasket The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
